visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with extreme close-up shots of spicy Korean rice cakes (tteokbokki) being lifted with a fork, revealing thick, stretchy melted cheese against a vibrant red sauce. A female character with long dark hair is seen sitting at a table in a brightly lit indoor restaurant, wearing a white sweater and smiling while eating. (2) The scene transitions to a series of rapid montages showing various Korean delicacies, including a large platter of deep red raw beef (Mungtigi) seasoned with sesame seeds, cold noodles in a silver bowl, and numerous small side dishes on a wooden table. The lighting is warm and natural, typical of an indoor dining setting. (3) The character is then shown outdoors on an urban street, walking past retail storefronts and carrying a green and white shopping bag from 'Olive Young.' The camera follows her in a handheld style, capturing the bustling atmosphere of the shopping district with clear daylight. (4) The visuals shift back to high-resolution food inserts, specifically showing grilled intestines (makchang) sizzling on a metal grill and a bubbling pot of soybean paste stew (doenjang-jjigae). (5) In the final phase, the main character is seen in a studio-like setting wearing a pink cardigan and then a blue-and-white striped top, holding a silver Cathay United Bank CUBE credit card towards the camera. She interacts with a smartphone showing the CUBE app interface, demonstrating how to use the card for benefits. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting her facial expressions and the physical card.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 韓國大邱人私藏的五大必吃美食. [Subtitle]: 謹慎理財、信用無價. (2) [Variety]: 最後還有一個韓國旅遊省錢的小撇步. (3) [Subtitle]: 先按讚跟分享喔. (4) [Slogan]: 1. Sinjeon 辣炒年糕. (5) [Slogan]: 2. P.S. [Variety]: 回訪三次了. (6) [Slogan]: 3. 大邱燉排骨. (7) [Slogan]: 4. 格列佛烤腸. (8) [Slogan]: 5. Mungtigi 生牛肉片. (9) [Slogan]: 大邱必吃!!! (10) [Slogan]: 年底前只要在韓國實體店刷CUBE信用卡. (11) [Slogan]: 最高可以拿到14.3% 小樹點(信用卡)回饋. (12) [Slogan]: 國泰世華CUBE App. (13) [Slogan]: 切換到『趣旅行』方案.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 3 occasional passers-by or other diners in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, dark, slightly wavy hair. She wears various outfits including a white sweater, a pink cardigan over a grey skirt, and a blue-and-white horizontal striped long-sleeve top. She has a friendly and expressive facial appearance.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Vibrant restaurant interiors with wooden tables and metal grills; a busy urban street with Korean signage and retail shops like Olive Young; a clean indoor room with a light-colored wall and blinds.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A cheerful female voice introduces a travel food guide with high-pitched, enthusiastic intonation. Background music features a rhythmic acoustic guitar and soft percussion at a moderate tempo. (2) Each food item is introduced with a sharp vocal emphasis. Subtle 'whoosh' sound effects are used between scene cuts. The narrator's speech rate is fast and energetic, maintaining a high level of arousal. (3) Transition to a promotional segment is marked by a slight shift in tone to a more explanatory but still friendly and persuasive professional delivery. The BGM continues seamlessly under the voiceover. (4) The audio concludes with a final enthusiastic call to action, maintaining bright spectral weight and clear articulation.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide travel and dining recommendations for Daegu, Korea, while strategically promoting the Cathay United Bank CUBE credit card as the ideal financial tool for travelers to maximize rewards and savings.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly shows and discusses the benefits of the Cathay United Bank CUBE card, including specific percentage rewards and instructions for using the app.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively blends lifestyle travel content with a direct financial product endorsement, utilizing high-speed editing and vibrant food imagery to maintain viewer engagement.
